kinesisfirehose.deliverystream.outputfor: Specifies the serializer that you want Kinesis Data Firehose to use to convert the format of your data before it writes it to Amazon S3. This parameter is required if `Enabled` is set to true.

kinesisfirehose.deliverystream.outputfor.Description: Specifies which serializer to use. You can choose either the ORC SerDe or the Parquet SerDe. If both are non-null, the server rejects the request.
